metadata.description: Dam Secure skills for Claude Code: install the ones you want.

plugins.name: damsecure-setup
plugins.description: End-to-end Dam Secure onboarding: connect the CLI + MCP (Secure Spec plan review), onboard a repository, review and add rules, and triage PR and issue findings.

plugins.name: damsecure-triage
plugins.description: Work through Dam Secure findings and fix them: pull findings from the MCP into a local worklist, bring each into context, remediate the code with the user, mark it fixed, then move to the next — over a PR or the open backlog.
